title: Bundle Profile v1
description: Schema for the payload entry of a KDNA bundle container.

profile.description: Profile identifier. Must be the literal string 'bundle-profile-v1'.

components.description: List of component assets bundled in this container.

id.description: The unique identifier of the component asset.

path.description: Relative path to the component asset (.kdna container) within the bundle payload or bundle package.

priority.description: Optional priority for resolving card conflicts.

context_budget.description: Optional token budget declaration for this Bundle. When present, kdna plan-load reports per-component token cost estimates against this budget.

max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for the full Bundle load (compact profile). plan-load reports whether resolved components fit within this limit.

strategy.description: Strategy when resolved components exceed max_tokens. warn: proceed with a stderr warning. truncate_lowest_priority: drop lowest-priority components to fit within budget. error: block loading if over budget.

per_component_estimate_tokens.description: Declared token cost per component for the compact load profile. If absent, the runtime uses a default estimate of 1000 tokens per component.

context_budget_strategy.description: Deprecated top-level alias for context_budget.strategy. Prefer context_budget.strategy instead.
